Name: Sales Conversion Rate
Description: Measures the efficiency of the sales team in converting leads into paying customers. Industry standard for high-growth SaaS.

Name: Information Security Fundamentals
Description: Essential training covering phishing, password hygiene, and data protection (GDPR/POPI compliance).

Name: New Manager Accelerator
Description: A 90-day growth plan for newly promoted leaders focusing on delegation and emotional intelligence.

Name: Digital Literacy & AI Fluency
Description: Foundational skills for the modern workplace, including AI prompt engineering and data security awareness.

KeyIndicators: Can use Generative AI tools effectively
